scripts.setup: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('.env.local')) fs.copyFileSync('.env.example','.env.local'); console.log('Created .env.local — add keys, then run: npm run dev (or npm run start)');" && npm install
scripts.use-keys: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const p=path.join(__dirname,'OPEN-THIS-FILE-ADD-YOUR-KEYS.txt'); if(!fs.existsSync(p)){ console.log('Missing OPEN-THIS-FILE-ADD-YOUR-KEYS.txt'); process.exit(1); } const s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'); const lines=s.split('\n').filter(l=>/^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*=/.test(l.trim())); fs.writeFileSync('.env.local', lines.join('\n')); console.log('Keys copied to .env.local. Run: npm run dev');"
scripts.fix-vercel: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=require('path').join(__dirname,'.vercel'); if(fs.existsSync(p)){ fs.rmSync(p, { recursive: true }); console.log('Removed .vercel — run: npm run start'); } else { console.log('No .vercel folder'); }"
scripts.dev:vite: node scripts/ensure-local-api-port.mjs && cross-env DEV_API_PROXY_TARGET=http://127.0.0.1:8787 LOCAL_API_PORT=8787 concurrently -k -n api,vite -c cyan,magenta "node scripts/local-api-or-keepalive.mjs" "node run-with-env.js vite"
